strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and React (e.g., Optilyz platform and WatchUp apps)
Strong backend expertise with Node.js, Nest.js, and AI agent infrastructure (e.g., re:cinq and MCP code generators)
Proven track record in architecture, scalability, and performance optimization (e.g., GISCollective platform on Kubernetes)
concerns: Primary stack alignment: Limited explicit mention of Vitest (only Jest/Vitest listed in skills, no project evidence)
AI agent development: Only recent experience (re:cinq) with no long-term or deep technical depth demonstrated
Secondary stack gap: No evidence of Kotlin/Java usage in recent roles (last Java project was 2018)
response.justification: The candidate meets high-impact requirements with 8+ years of full-stack development using TypeScript/Node.js/React (e.g., Optilyz platform and WatchUp apps). They also demonstrate relevant architecture and scalability experience (e.g., GISCollective on Kubernetes). However, they lack evidence for Vitest (only Jest mentioned) and have minimal recent Kotlin/Java experience, which are secondary but required skills. AI agent experience is present but not deeply evidenced beyond recent work.
